metadata.title: Universal Agent
metadata.description: Flexible AI assistant with specialized skills

UniversalAgent.title: Universal AI Workspace
UniversalAgent.subtitle: Turn vague ideas into research, interviews, and report outputs with a skill-extensible workflow.
UniversalAgent.landingQuestion: What can I do for you?
UniversalAgent.composerPlaceholder: Describe the job to be done, e.g. Analyze 2026 North America coffee market opportunities and suggest actions.
UniversalAgent.composerHint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for newline
UniversalAgent.quickPromptStudy: Run a competitive landscape scan for a new consumer brand.
UniversalAgent.quickPromptInterview: Create an interview guide about breakfast decisions of young moms.
UniversalAgent.quickPromptReport: Convert this discussion into a one-page executive summary.
UniversalAgent.quickPromptIdeas: Give me 5 testable product positioning directions.
UniversalAgent.skillPanelDescription: Upload your custom skill bundle to expand this workspace's execution capability.
UniversalAgent.capabilityResearchDesc: Decompose vague questions into actionable research tasks and keep progressing.
UniversalAgent.capabilityInterviewDesc: Coordinate persona interviews and track key agreements and conflicts.
UniversalAgent.capabilityReportDesc: Turn process results into readable and shareable report artifacts.
UniversalAgent.capabilitySkillDesc: Plug in domain-specific skills so AI workflows fit your business context.
UniversalAgent.newChatPrompt: What would you like to talk about?
UniversalAgent.inputPlaceholder: Type your message... (Shift+Enter for new line)
UniversalAgent.executionSelectTask: Select a task to view execution progress.
UniversalAgent.executionSubAgentNotReady: Task chat is not available yet.
UniversalAgent.executionWaitingFirstStep: Task is running. Waiting for the first milestone...
UniversalAgent.executionNoSteps: No execution steps found for this task.
UniversalAgent.executionReportReady: Report is ready. Click preview to open.
UniversalAgent.executionReportGeneratedHint: The main report has finished. Open the preview to review the final artifact.
UniversalAgent.executionReportStreamingHint: Report content is still being written. You can inspect the live draft as it updates.
UniversalAgent.executionReportLivePreviewCaption: Below is the live preview of the current report draft.
UniversalAgent.executionStepRunningHint: This step is still running. Expand it to inspect the latest output.
UniversalAgent.taskDoneOpenDetailsHint: Done. Open details in right panel.
UniversalAgent.taskStartedWaitingUpdate: Task started. Progress updates will appear shortly.
UniversalAgent.taskCreatedWaitingFirstUpdate: Task created. Waiting for the first update.
UniversalAgent.taskExecutionFailedHint: Execution failed. Open progress details to troubleshoot.
UniversalAgent.stepInterviewSummary: Interviewing selected personas for decision and behavior signals.
UniversalAgent.stepDiscussionSummary: Running moderated group discussion and collecting viewpoints.
UniversalAgent.stepReportSummary: Producing report artifact from the collected research evidence.
UniversalAgent.stepPodcastSummary: Producing podcast artifact based on research findings.
UniversalAgent.stepSynthesizeSummary: Summarizing patterns and trade-offs from collected inputs.
UniversalAgent.stepScoutSummary: Exploring social platforms to identify target users and signals.
UniversalAgent.stepPersonaSummary: Assembling persona candidates for downstream research.
UniversalAgent.stepWebEvidenceSummary: Gathering external evidence from web sources.
UniversalAgent.stepGenericSummary: Completing one step in the research workflow.
